title: Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST) Q1 2020 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Twist Bioscience Corp reported its Q1 2020 earnings call with strong quarterly performance. The company reported revenue reaching $17.2 million, exceeding guidance of $15-16.5 million. Orders totaled a record $24.8 million, representing 63% year-over-year growth. The synthetic biology segment shipped approximately 80,000 genes, while the genomics/NGS division generated $7 million in revenue, a notable 86% increase compared to the prior year. The emerging biopharma segment showed early promise with $700,000 in orders during the quarter. The company announced resolution of its long-standing dispute with Agilent Technologies. CEO Emily Leproust stated: We not only survived but we thrived through the attack, referring to the legal challenge. The settlement required a one-time payment of $22.5 million with no admission of liability. Management highlighted several initiatives including selection as a DNA synthesis provider for the IARPA Molecular Information Storage program (valued at up to $9.15 million to Twist) and a collaboration with Schrodinger for antibody therapeutics discovery. For full fiscal 2020, the company maintained revenue guidance of $80-84 million and projected net losses between $129.5-132.5 million, including settlement expenses.
